title: Intraday Normalized Item
description: Source item after normalization. Canonical internal format used by all downstream stages.

item_id.description: Deterministic identifier: SHA-256( source_name + ':' + source_id ), hex-encoded. Used for deduplication.

source_id.description: Original source identifier, preserved from the source item.

source_url.description: Canonical URL of the original item.

headline.description: Cleaned, truncated headline. HTML stripped. Max 250 characters.

body.description: Cleaned body text. HTML stripped. Max 2000 characters. Null when not available.

topic_candidates.description: Topic slugs identified by lightweight keyword matching before the AI step.

published_at.description: Best-available event timestamp (ISO-8601 UTC). Falls back to fetched_at when source omits it.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the item was fetched.

is_duplicate.description: Set to true by the deduplication stage. Items where is_duplicate=true are dropped before AI classification.

examples.headline: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $120K
examples.body: Bitcoin surged past $120,000 on Wednesday, setting a new all-time high as institutional demand continued to rise.
